purpose: Reverse-closure map of all remaining unauthorized mutation paths after merged work through #896, Cloudflare Git Integration external disable, governed deployment spine, migration governance, mutation surface exhaustiveness, NULL semantics normalization, and deployment provenance/proof/rollback registries.
canonical_closure_condition: no unauthorized reality mutation path exists
null_semantics_invariant: UNDECLARED_MUTATION_SURFACE -> NULL; INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on undeclared surface -> NULL; no valid object -> nothing happens

incorporated_work.description: Cloudflare production authority bypass containment — CF-001 through CF-005 classified; wrangler.toml preview environment isolation; governed-deploy.ts shell-wrapped wrangler detection; AUTHORITY_EXPIRY derived from /authority response
Cloudflare Git Integration externally disabled at account level; residual bypass matrix RB-001 through RB-005 classified
Governed deployment spine — deployment_provenance_registry append-only, trigger-blocked, UNIQUE replay guard
Immutable deployment proof — deployment_proof_registry append-only, trigger-blocked, proof_binding_hash UNIQUE guard
Deployment replay rejection — replay prevention at deploy spine level
Rollback lineage verification — deployment_rollback_registry append-only, trigger-blocked, rollback_proof_binding_hash UNIQUE guard
Governed D1 migration legitimacy — migration_governance_registry append-only, trigger-blocked, mutation_capable=false, creates_authority=false, executable=false by schema CHECK
Mutation surface exhaustiveness — every INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE in src/index.ts mapped; UNDECLARED_MUTATION_SURFACE -> NULL enforced
Semantic consistency closure — NULL semantics normalization for undeclared surfaces
Authorized mutation surface exhaustiveness — classification schema AUTHORITATIVE/EVIDENCE_ONLY/NON_EXECUTABLE applied to all 63 declared surfaces

surfaces.current_gate: BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json advisory only; policy_only_non_enforcing; no GitHub branch protection rules actively enforced
surfaces.residual_gap: Direct push to main bypasses PREO/SCO governance checks and CODEOWNERS review. Branch protection policy defined but not enforced at GitHub settings level.
surfaces.closure_action: Enable GitHub branch protection for main: require PRs, require CODEOWNERS review, require status checks (merge-governance-check, generate-preo-candidate, generate-sco-candidate), block force pushes, block direct pushes.

surfaces.current_gate: merge-governance-check.yml, preo-candidate.yml, sco-candidate.yml enforce PREO_VALID as merge gate; BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json defines required checks
surfaces.residual_gap: Branch protection not enforced at GitHub settings level; admin or owner can merge without passing required checks until #380 closed.
surfaces.closure_action: Enforce GitHub branch protection per BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json. Disable admin bypass. Ensure merge-governance-check is a required status check.

surfaces.current_gate: BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json advisory policy document only; GitHub repository settings not yet aligned
surfaces.residual_gap: Branch protection rules are declared in policy artifacts but not applied at GitHub account level. Admin-level pushes and merges without checks remain possible.
surfaces.closure_action: Apply BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.json required controls in GitHub repository settings. Disable allow_admin_bypass. Require status checks, PR review, CODEOWNERS approval.

surfaces.current_gate: .github/CODEOWNERS and CODEOWNERS define @joselunasrt8-creator as owner for governance/, src/runtime/, .github/workflows/**; enforcement depends on branch protection
surfaces.residual_gap: CODEOWNERS enforcement is advisory until branch protection (#380) requires CODEOWNERS approval. Ownership is declared but not enforced.
surfaces.closure_action: Enforce CODEOWNERS review via branch protection required_approving_review_count >= 1 with dismiss_stale_reviews=true.

surfaces.current_gate: governed-deploy.yml requires decision_id, validated_object_hash, invocation_nonce; full canonical chain traversal (/session → /proof) with replay protection; authority expiry derived from /authority response (not hardcoded)
surfaces.residual_gap: workflow_dispatch with fabricated decision_id/validated_object_hash/invocation_nonce is theoretically possible but blocked by /compile hash match requirement. approval_gated=false: no additional human approval gate before deploy step.
surfaces.closure_action: Add GitHub environment approval gate to governed-deploy.yml production environment. Monitor for workflow definition drift via constitutional-integrity.yml.

surfaces.current_gate: prepare-governed-deploy.yml dispatches canonical chain calls (/session→/compile) but does NOT deploy; produces manual inputs for downstream governed-deploy.yml run; cannot deploy autonomously
surfaces.residual_gap: Repeated workflow_dispatch on prepare-governed-deploy.yml generates multiple valid deploy-candidate tuples. Each adds reusable DECISION_ID/INVOCATION_NONCE that could be replayed in separate governed-deploy.yml run before expiry.
surfaces.closure_action: Rate-limit or one-shot-gate prepare-governed-deploy.yml dispatch. Expire generated tuples after first consume. Track multi-tuple proliferation in governance observability.

surfaces.current_gate: No scheduled (cron) or automatic deploy workflows present in .github/workflows/. All deploy workflows require explicit workflow_dispatch. Non-deploy workflows trigger on push/pull_request events only.
surfaces.residual_gap: None. No scheduled mutation workflows exist. Constitutional-integrity.yml, merge-governance-check.yml, preo-candidate.yml, sco-candidate.yml are event-triggered governance checks, not deploy surfaces.
surfaces.closure_action: Monitor for introduction of scheduled deploy workflows via constitutional-integrity.yml workflow-change detection.

surfaces.current_gate: NONE — account-level disable is still PENDING (tracked under #1832/GAP-006/GAP-002). Code-side containment (wrangler.toml [env.preview]) isolates the preview environment only; it does not gate Git Integration's push-triggered production deploy path. Corrected 2026-06-08 per issue #1883 closure reconciliation: this entry previously asserted 'external disable now confirmed' / status CONTAINED, which contradicted runtime/cloudflare-sovereignty.test.ts (governed_by_mindshift=false, status=OPEN, production_capability=true), GOVERNANCE_GAP_REGISTRY.md GAP-006 ('account-level disable pending'), and governance/runtime/RESIDUAL_BYPASS_MATRIX.json RB-001 ('OPEN — account-level disable required'). No artifact in the repository evidences the account-level action was performed.
surfaces.residual_gap: Cloudflare Git Integration remains enabled at the account level. Every push-triggered deploy through this path bypasses the canonical /session -> /continuity -> /authority -> /compile -> /validate -> /execute -> /proof chain and is an ungoverned, production-capable mutation. Observable only in the Cloudflare dashboard/audit log; no MindShift proof registry binding exists for this path.
surfaces.closure_action: Disable Git Integration at the Cloudflare account level; capture verifiable evidence (dashboard state export or API query result) in-repo; update this entry, GAP-002, GAP-006, and cloudflare-sovereignty.test.ts to CLOSED only once that evidence exists. Until then this surface must be tracked as OPEN, not CONTAINED.

surfaces.current_gate: scripts/governed-deploy.ts: MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT=github_actions_governed required; canonical legitimacy artifact must exist; wrangler + shell-wrapped (bash/sh/zsh -c wrangler) invocations blocked outside governed context; package.json deploy script exits 1
surfaces.residual_gap: Governed deploy wrapper enforces context guard and canonical artifact check. Residual: holder of CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN + MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT can fabricate local legitimacy artifact if they also control canonical chain endpoints. Audit trail in deploy_audit_registry.json.
surfaces.closure_action: Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC only per RB-002 closure condition. Eliminate static token capability for local production deploy.

surfaces.current_gate: CF-002: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN with Workers:Write scope. Classified CLASSIFIED_OPEN / root break-glass authority. Not governed by MindShift runtime.
surfaces.residual_gap: Direct wrangler deploy with valid CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN bypasses all canonical chain requirements. Production deploy possible without session/authority/proof lineage. Observable only in Cloudflare dashboard deploy log. Not bound to MindShift proof registry.
surfaces.closure_action: Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC. Eliminate static token with Workers:Write scope. Classify all uses as root authority events. Require audit log verification.

surfaces.current_gate: CF-004: governed-deploy.ts context guard rejects deploys outside MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT=github_actions_governed; package.json deploy script exits 1. Requires valid CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN + context variable + legitimacy artifact.
surfaces.residual_gap: Developer with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN can invoke wrangler deploy directly, bypassing governed-deploy.ts wrapper entirely. Script guard is not cryptographically enforced. Audit trail in deploy_audit_registry.json for governed-deploy.ts invocations only.
surfaces.closure_action: Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC. Enforce token restriction at Cloudflare account level so no local session can acquire production-deploy scope.

surfaces.current_gate: migration_governance_registry: append-only, UPDATE/DELETE trigger-blocked, mutation_capable=false, creates_authority=false, executable=false enforced by schema CHECK constraints. Governed migration legitimacy closure per #360.
surfaces.residual_gap: wrangler d1 migrations apply invocation with valid CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN can apply schema migrations to production D1 outside canonical chain. migration_governance_registry records declarations but does not block raw wrangler migration apply. Requires token + CLI access.
surfaces.closure_action: Bind wrangler d1 migrations apply to governed deploy workflow. Require migration legitimacy artifact before migration apply. Scope token to restrict D1:Write outside governed contexts.

surfaces.current_gate: Seven-step canonical chain (/session→/continuity→/authority→/compile→/validate→/execute→/proof) with authority_bound, validator_bound, proof_bound, replay_safe per MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json; undeclared surface → NULL
surfaces.residual_gap: AUTHORITATIVE surfaces (session, continuity, authority, aeo, validation, execution, proof registries) are route-bound. Raw database write bypass (RB path) remains theoretically possible via D1 direct API with credentials. No declared route exists outside canonical chain for AUTHORITATIVE mutation.
surfaces.closure_action: Maintain exhaustiveness invariant via mutation-surface-exhaustiveness.ts scanner. Fail-closed on undeclared mutation surface. Scope D1 credentials to governed workflows only.

surfaces.current_gate: /proof canonical route exclusively writes proof_registry (INSERT + UPDATE for decision_hash backfill). EVIDENCE_ONLY surfaces append-only. proof_quarantine_registry and proof_propagation_outbox trigger-blocked against UPDATE/DELETE.
surfaces.residual_gap: proof_registry INSERT and bounded UPDATE (decision_hash backfill) are AUTHORITATIVE and route-bound. Raw D1 write with credentials could INSERT fabricated proof records. No external attestation of proof_registry content integrity beyond replay and hash checks.
surfaces.closure_action: Cryptographic content-addressing of proof records. External proof attestation per #382 release provenance work. Scope D1 credentials to governed workflows.

surfaces.current_gate: deployment_provenance_registry, deployment_proof_registry, deployment_rollback_registry: append-only, UPDATE/DELETE trigger-blocked, UNIQUE hash guards enforce replay resistance, creates_authority=false, execution_capable=false, governance_bound=true per MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json
surfaces.residual_gap: None within governed runtime. These registries are evidence-only and cannot authorize execution or create authority. Raw D1 INSERT with credentials could add fabricated deployment evidence records but creates no governance authority.
surfaces.closure_action: Maintain trigger-blocked append-only semantics. Periodic reconciliation verification via cross_registry_reconciliation_registry.

surfaces.current_gate: No governed release or tag creation workflow exists. GitHub allows any repository writer to create tags. No signed-tag requirement. No provenance attestation boundary defined.
surfaces.residual_gap: Tags and GitHub releases can be created without canonical chain traversal, PREO validation, or proof lineage. Release artifacts cannot be traced back to governed repository state. No release provenance boundary defined.
surfaces.closure_action: Define release provenance and artifact attestation boundary per #382. Require signed tags or DSSE attestations. Require passing validation evidence and proof lineage reference before release creation.

surfaces.current_gate: No npm publish or package artifact publication workflow exists in current codebase. package.json has no publish configuration. No governance boundary defined for artifact publication.
surfaces.residual_gap: If an npm publish workflow were introduced, it would not currently pass through any governance gate. No package integrity verification or artifact attestation exists.
surfaces.closure_action: Define package publication governance policy as part of #382 release provenance work. Require provenance attestation before publication. Restrict publish credentials to governed workflows.

surfaces.current_gate: surface_001 in unauthorized_mutation_surface_inventory.json: agent_tool_invocation classified CLOSED/CONTAINED; containment=CLASSIFIED_CONTAINED; bypass_risk=none. AGENTS.md defines agent execution protocols. .codex defines codex-execution-protocol.
surfaces.residual_gap: Agent/Codex/Cursor tool invocations that mutate repository files (code edits, file creation) can be merged without canonical chain traversal if branch protection is not enforced (#380). Tool invocations are constrained by AGENTS.md protocol but not cryptographically gated.
surfaces.closure_action: Enforce branch protection (#380) to ensure all agent-authored changes pass PREO/SCO merge governance checks. Require adversarial verification (#695) to enumerate tool-based bypass vectors.

surfaces.current_gate: Classified as explicit break-glass authority. CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, GitHub admin credentials, Cloudflare account owner credentials. Non-normal execution path. Audit observable via Cloudflare dashboard and GitHub audit log. root_authority_constraints.json: root_authority_escalation=NULL.
surfaces.residual_gap: Root credentials (Cloudflare account owner, GitHub repository admin, static CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN) can mutate any surface without passing through canonical chain. Classified as non-normal execution. No cryptographic constraint possible at repository level.
surfaces.closure_action: Scope CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN to GitHub Actions OIDC only. Enforce GitHub admin bypass=false via branch protection. Classify all root credential uses as explicit break-glass events requiring audit log entry. Periodic break-glass audit.

surfaces.current_gate: GET-only routes: /reconcile, /reconcile/closure, /reconcile/containment, /reconcile/drift, /reconcile/report, /reconcile/schedule, /sovereignty/root-authority, /health. Classification: NON_EXECUTABLE in MUTATION_SURFACE_EXHAUSTIVENESS.json. Cannot mutate state or authorize execution.
surfaces.residual_gap: None. GET-only routes are read-only observability. Reconciliation surfaces are classified NON_EXECUTABLE. Cannot create authority, execution, or legitimacy.
surfaces.closure_action: Maintain GET-only constraint. Monitor for observability_authority_escalation drift class. Enforce OBSERVABILITY_AUTHORITY_ESCALATION detection in governance semantic divergence checks.

surfaces.current_gate: install_base_telemetry_registry: EVIDENCE_ONLY, non-authoritative, best-effort, append-only, UPDATE/DELETE trigger-blocked per #903/#912. creates_authority=false, execution_capable=false, governance_bound=true. INSTALL_BASE_TELEMETRY_WRITE_FAILED is a silent, non-blocking error event.
surfaces.residual_gap: None. Telemetry is best-effort, non-authoritative, and cannot create authority or gate execution. Write failure is non-blocking and does not affect governance state.
surfaces.closure_action: Maintain non-authoritative classification. Enforce trigger-blocked append-only constraint. Validate OBSERVABILITY_ONLY invariant in governance conformance checks.

surfaces.current_gate: No adversarial execution surface verification suite exists. Issue #695 scopes required adversarial infrastructure: bypass path enumeration, hidden mutation surface discovery, workflow dispatch verification, replay exploit attempts, authority reuse attempts, orphan execution detection.
surfaces.residual_gap: Without adversarial verification, undiscovered bypass-capable mutation surfaces cannot be classified or closed. This map represents a best-effort classification from available evidence; residual exploitability is unknown until adversarial suite (#695) regenerates verification after this map.
surfaces.closure_action: Implement adversarial verification infrastructure per #695: execution surface inventory scanner, deploy-path topology mapping, replay attack fixtures, orphan execution fixtures, unauthorized workflow dispatch fixtures, proof lineage break fixtures, exact-object mutation fixtures.

invariants.description: Cloudflare Git Integration is CONTAINED: external account-level disable active + code-side environment isolation (#896). If re-enabled, all subsequent push-triggered deploys are ungoverned production mutations.
All break-glass/root credential paths are explicitly classified as non-normal execution and cannot create legitimacy through MindShift canonical chain.
Observability and telemetry surfaces are classified OBSERVABILITY_ONLY and cannot create authority, authorize execution, or generate legitimacy.
Release/tag creation remains OPEN and linked to #382 until release provenance governance is defined and enforced.
Main branch protection remains OPEN and linked to #380 until GitHub branch protection rules are enforced at settings level.
Adversarial verification remains OPEN and linked to #695 until adversarial verification suite is implemented and regenerated after this map.
NULL semantics normalization: undeclared mutation surface → NULL; no valid object → nothing happens. Enforced by mutation-surface-exhaustiveness.ts scanner and schema CHECK constraints.
Deployment provenance, proof, and rollback registries are append-only, trigger-blocked, UNIQUE-hash-guarded evidence surfaces that cannot create authority or authorize execution.
